title: cyclosorus cylindrothrix
intro: Cyclosorus cylindrothrix is a species of fern, belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Cyclosorus cylindrothrix can be consumed in the form of tea, infusion, or extract, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
